inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 net cash used in operating activities $10.0M negative on ~206M post-IPO shares = -$0.05/sh filing path; Lawrence base uses $0.18/sh normalized owner cash after stripping $363.3M forward-contract gain and growth cloud capex [Assumption]
inputs.shares_source: S-1 diluted weighted-average 171.821M (as-if converted) plus 34.5M IPO primary shares (8-K May 15 2026)
inputs.normalization_note: GAAP net income $237.8M includes one-time $363.3M forward contract extinguishment gain; operating loss $145.9M; PP&E purchases $382.7M for Cerebras Cloud build-out

not_in_model_requires_refresh: OpenAI MRA revenue recognition schedule and capacity tranche timing
Post-IPO share count and dual-class voting dilution path
Wafer-scale Engine 4 product cycle gross margin bridge
Custom ASIC competition from NVIDIA Blackwell/Rubin and hyperscaler silicon
Working Capital Loan $1.0B repayment terms tied to OpenAI delivery milestones

capex_stress_2026.capex_source: FY2025 PP&E $382.7M plus [Assumption] incremental cloud build for OpenAI tranches
capex_stress_2026.notes: Illustrative trough if cloud capex accelerates before OpenAI revenue converts; not Lawrence FCF0

ai_inflection_bull.fcf_y0_note: [Assumption] FY2028 normalized if OpenAI MRA converts and cloud mix exceeds 50% of revenue at 45%+ gross margin

segments.label: Wafer-scale hardware systems (CS-3 / WSE-3)
segments.owner_cash_y0_source: Normalized owner cash allocated 70% by FY2025 hardware revenue share (S-1)
segments.notes: FY2025 hardware revenue $358.4M; customer concentration G42/MBZUAI/OpenAI

segments.label: Cerebras Cloud and inference services
segments.owner_cash_y0_source: Normalized owner cash allocated 30% by FY2025 cloud revenue share (S-1)
segments.notes: Cloud revenue $151.6M (+94% YoY); OpenAI Codex-Spark inference; capex-heavy ramp

options.label: OpenAI multi-year MRA ($20B+ disclosed value, 750 MW)
options.base_terminal_rationale: Contracted capacity conversion modeled in cloud segment growth years 1-5, not separate terminal row
options.evidence: S-1 risk factors: MRA represents substantial portion of projected revenues; January 2026 announcement

options.label: OpenAI warrant (Series F-1 preferred linkage)
options.base_terminal_rationale: Warrant economics tied to OpenAI relationship; no SEC fair-value mark in base overlay until exercised or marked
options.evidence: S-1 Note 12 OpenAI Warrant; pre-IPO capital structure

options.label: Wafer-scale Engine 4 next-gen silicon
options.base_terminal_rationale: Pre-revenue at scale in overlay base; R&D burden in corporate drag until filing discloses revenue
options.evidence: S-1 R&D expense $243.3M FY2025; product roadmap risk factors

segment_build.corporate_drag_note: R&D and G&A in excess of segment allocation; stock-based compensation normalized

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Datacenter PP&E on balance sheet; cloud build capitalized

option_scan.question: Transitory or structural concentration?
option_scan.evidence: MBZUAI 62% and G42 24% of FY2025 revenue; OpenAI MRA forward-weighted (S-1)

optionality_gate.notes: IPO premium embeds OpenAI MRA; Lawrence base uses normalized $0.18/sh not GAAP net income

bear.notes: OpenAI delivery slip; customer concentration loss; margin compression vs NVIDIA

base.notes: OpenAI tranches ramp; cloud mix rises; hardware grows with sovereign AI demand

bull.notes: Full OpenAI MRA conversion; inference share gains; WSE-4 cycle on time

bear_case.notes: Primary risk: OpenAI MRA termination or delivery failure triggers Working Capital Loan repayment and revenue cliff

growth_explanation.mechanism: OpenAI 750 MW deployment and sovereign AI hardware orders drive revenue; cloud inference scales with installed base
growth_explanation.source: S-1 business description and risk factors
growth_explanation.stress: Customer concentration and capex ahead of cash conversion compress near-term owner cash

theory_implied.derivation: segment_build owner-cash weighted blend (growth only; exit from scenarios.base)

overlay_results.notes: [Assumption] FY2028 normalized if OpenAI MRA converts and cloud mix exceeds 50% of revenue at 45%+ gross margin

paths.label: Segment-derived growth (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
